decisions.title: Next.js App Router Scaffold
decisions.decision: Use Next.js App Router with TypeScript.
decisions.reason: Supports server routes, mobile web delivery, PWA growth, Netlify deployment, and independent application ownership.

decisions.title: No Calendar Models Until Step 5
decisions.reason: Database ownership, migration safety, and calendar namespace must be deliberately implemented in Step 5.

decisions.title: Development Shell Before Authentication
decisions.decision: Permit a non-production development shell before authentication is implemented.
decisions.boundary: No real candidate schedule data may be entered or displayed.

decisions.title: Safe Database Diagnostics
decisions.decision: Permit a read-only connection probe against RedDirt’s PostgreSQL database.
decisions.boundary: No schema changes, table writes, or migrations.

decisions.title: Mobile Bottom Navigation
decisions.decision: Use Today, Calendar, Add, Search, and More as the primary mobile navigation.
decisions.reason: These actions map directly to field use and future product growth.

decisions.title: Configurable Election Milestone
decisions.decision: Use a configurable November 3, 2026 election date for initial countdown behavior.
decisions.reason: The interface must show present-day-to-election context while remaining reusable.
